title: The Trap Tightens Around the Alliance
description: Pages 17–17 focus on the trap tightens around the alliance, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Doflamingo, Franky, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #24 as the Colosseum block battle reaches a brutal finish, setting up the tournament’s next stage and sharpening Luffy’s path toward the fruit.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Inside the Colosseum: Passages to audience seating

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: You're also plotting to destroy the factory!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Indeed I am....!! My comrades and I have been moving along steadily with the preparations!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Just tell me where it is!! I'll bring it down it in an instant!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: I can't allow that!! There are some who work in the factory who we aim to rescue!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: But our plan is one that could lead to the collapse of this entire country!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: If you possess the gall and the fortitude to stand against DoFlamingo ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: I will tell you everything there is to know about this tragic country, "dress- Rosa"!!

summary: Pages 17–17 focus on the trap tightens around the alliance, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
